positive: A stylized, high-contrast pattern featuring celestial bodies and stylized flora, such as glowing crescent moons, minimalist constellations, and overgrown, whimsical bioluminescent foliage (e.g., fern fronds, abstract vines). The composition must be centrally focused, suitable for all-over apparel printing, with strong black and white silhouettes interspersed with subtle pops of deep teal and gold accents. Style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau linework and modern graphic design, emphasizing clean, crisp edges and deep negative space. The overall mood is magical, ethereal, and sophisticated. Vector illustration aesthetic, high detail, perfect composition.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noise, grain, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, copyright, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor contrast, messy, messy composition
